title: clerodendrum paniculatum var. diversifolium
intro: Clerodendrum paniculatum var. diversifolium, also known as the Clerodendrum or Glory Bower plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum paniculatum var. diversifolium is often used as a decoction or infusion, typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
